visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a vertical split-screen. On the left, liquid is being poured into a cup of ramen. On the right, a young woman with dark hair wearing a grey sweater is chewing on a colorful chocolate. She is positioned in front of a plain off-white wall. (2) The woman holds up a white bowl containing ramen noodles and seasoning powder. She also presents a bottle of 'Cafe Plaza' coffee milk. She gestures enthusiastically towards the camera, her facial expressions are animated and her mouth is open as she speaks. (3) A close-up shot focuses on the bowl as hot water is poured from a stainless steel kettle. Next, the 'Cafe Plaza' coffee milk is poured into the ramen, followed by a small glass of white cream or milk. Silver chopsticks are seen stirring the mixture. (4) The woman takes a large bite of the noodles. Her eyes widen significantly in a shocked expression, then she smiles and nods her head. She continues to eat, lifting the noodles high with her chopsticks to show the texture to the viewer. (5) She introduces a second bottle of coffee (blue label) alongside a plate featuring a chocolate swiss roll cake. She takes a bite of the cake and then a swig of the coffee directly from the bottle, looking extremely satisfied. (6) The video ends with a montage of the woman eating ramen rapidly and holding both coffee bottles, pointing downwards towards promotional text overlays. The lighting is bright studio-style throughout, emphasizing the product labels.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓網上已經超有名!! [Logo]: 韓網上已經超有名!! 🇰🇷韓國泡麵加咖啡牛奶☕️. [Variety]: !. [Subtitle]: 在韓國泡麵加. (2) [Subtitle]: 咖啡牛奶？！ [Variety]: 實驗敢膩🇰🇷. (3) [Subtitle]: 準備辣牛肉泡麵. (4) [Subtitle]: 還有咖啡跟牛奶！. (5) [Subtitle]: 在韓國本來要用咖啡牛奶 不過我人在台灣 然後也比較喜歡這個 台灣的咖啡！這是咖啡廣場 奶香特調咖啡 這味道很香，超好喝喔💕. (6) [Subtitle]: 重點是！不是直接倒進去 先加熱水 (原本熱水的三分之二). (7) [Subtitle]: 再加咖啡廣場！[Variety]: 加！. (8) [Subtitle]: 加牛奶. (9) [Variety]: (收到衝擊). (10) [Variety]: (不能相信再喝). (11) [Variety]: 真假. (12) [Subtitle]: 從親民的泡麵味道 變成高級料理的感覺！真的好吃餒...大家！真的要吃看看. (13) [Subtitle]: 我一開始其實以為這個完全不會搭配 但真的好吃欸 難怪那麼多韓國人在家裡這樣吃‼️也有點像 泰式椰奶湯麵類～. (14) [Subtitle]: 我覺得 咖啡廣場就是一個殺手鐧 我平常非常喜歡喝他們的 咖啡廣場奶香特調咖啡 還有另一個是調合式冰咖啡！. (15) [Subtitle]: 他們咖啡本身融合焦糖、奶香 香香甜甜 早就知道配一般食物的話 一定會很好搭配 但沒想到直接 加在泡麵這麼好喝！！！. (16) [Subtitle]: 調合式冰咖啡的話，應該要搭配甜的吧 等我一下(?) [Variety]: (哼歌). (17) [Subtitle]: 調合式冰咖啡跟蛋糕 搭配起來很完美🍰 太好吃了...！一口接一口！. (18) [Subtitle]: 尤其咖啡的焦糖香氣濃郁 就想一直聞聞看的那種 其實我以前沒那麼喜歡喝 一般的美式咖啡 因為有些喝起來有一點苦. (19) [Subtitle]: 但咖啡廣場系列都很好喝不苦！而且價格才28元 太便宜了吧！. (20) [Subtitle]: 現在7-ELEVEN買咖啡廣場 還可以享受特價兩瓶49元喔 詳細資訊在文案裡面！[Variety]: (猛吃). (21) [Variety]: (發現自己後傻笑). (22) [Subtitle]: 但真的很好吃！！！大家也可以試試看😍.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a casual grey long-sleeved sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple, clean indoor environment with a plain off-white or light beige wall, suggesting a home-studio setting for social media content.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, upbeat electronic pop music with a steady synthesized beat. A bright 'Ding' sound effect signals the start. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, energetic tone, welcoming the audience. (2) As the speaker continues her rapid-fire narration, a subtle 'Pop' sound effect occurs. The background music maintains a constant volume while her voice shows high variability and excitement. (3) Clear acoustic details of liquid splashing and pouring are audible as she prepares the food. This is followed by a crisp slurping sound as she tastes the ramen. (4) Another 'Whoosh' transition sound occurs. The speaker's voice becomes more intense and surprised, with audible gasps of delight. The BGM continues its rhythmic loop underneath her speech. (5) As she tries the second product, the sound of her biting into a cake (soft crunch) is heard. She sings a short, melodic hum ('Hmm-mm') and the music swells slightly. (6) The video concludes with the speaker delivering a final call to action at a fast pace. The BGM remains energetic until the very end, accompanied by rhythmic slurping and eating sounds before a final sharp cut-off.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Experiment/Process -> Emotional Reaction -> Product Expansion -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote 'Cafe Plaza' coffee products by demonstrating a trendy and unusual food hack—mixing coffee milk with Korean spicy ramen—and validating its taste through the creator's enthusiastic positive reaction. It further expands the product's utility by suggesting more traditional pairings like cake, finally concluding with a price-driven call to action at 7-Eleven.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator holds the products clearly, describes their specific flavors, mentions the retail price, and promotes a specific 7-Eleven discount.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-arousal social media editing style (fast cuts, colorful text, sound effects) to maintain viewer engagement during a product endorsement. The 'shock factor' of the ramen/coffee combo acts as an effective hook.
